title: Monitoring
name: Monitoring
queryMapping:
SELECT
$concat AS budgetid,
bdg_status,
bdg_year,
sum(IFNULL(bdg_lock_amt,0)) bdg_lock_amt,
IFNULL(bdg_bal_carryforward,0) bdg_bal_carryforward,
sum(IFNULL(bdg_topup_amt,0)) bdg_topup_amt,
IFNULL(bdg_initial_amt,0) bdg_initial_amt,
sum(IFNULL(bdg_additional_amt,0)) bdg_additional_amt,
sum(IFNULL(bdg_virement_amt,0)) bdg_virement_amt,
sum(IFNULL(bdg_allocated_amt,0)) bdg_allocated_amt,
sum(IFNULL(bdg_request_amt,0)) bdg_request_amt,
sum(IFNULL(bdg_commit_amt,0)) bdg_commit_amt,
sum(IFNULL(bdg_expenses_amt,0)) bdg_expenses_amt,
sum(IFNULL(bdg_balance_amt,0)) bdg_balance_amt,
SB.fty_fund_type,
FT.fty_fund_desc,
SB.at_activity_code,
ATS.at_activity_description_bm,
SB.oun_code,
OU.oun_desc,
SB.ccr_costcentre,
CC.ccr_costcentre_desc,
SB.lbc_budget_code,
IFNULL(AM.acm_acct_desc, lbc.lbc_description) acm_acct_desc,
sum(IFNULL(bdg_pre_request_amt,0)) bdg_pre_request_amt,
bdg_closing,
bdg_closing_by
FROM
GROUP BY
CONCAT_WS('-', SB.fty_fund_type, SB.at_activity_code,SB.oun_code, SB.ccr_costcentre, SB.lbc_budget_code),
bdg_status,
bdg_year,
IFNULL(bdg_allocated_amt,0),
IFNULL(bdg_bal_carryforward,0),
IFNULL(bdg_initial_amt,0),
SB.fty_fund_type,
FT.fty_fund_desc,
SB.at_activity_code,
ATS.at_activity_description_bm,
SB.oun_code,
OU.oun_desc,
SB.ccr_costcentre,
CC.ccr_costcentre_desc,
SB.lbc_budget_code,
IFNULL(AM.acm_acct_desc, lbc.lbc_description)

title: List of Previous Yearly Budgets
name: dt_listing
queryMapping:
SELECT
concat_ws('_',b.bdg_budget_id,b.bdg_budget_id) ID,
b.bdg_budget_id,
b.bdg_year,
b.qbu_quarter_id,
sb.fty_fund_type,
sb.oun_code,
sb.ccr_costcentre,
sb.at_activity_code,
at.activity_group_code,
sb.lbc_budget_code,
b.bdg_commit_amt,
b.bdg_request_amt,
b.bdg_balance_amt,
ifnull(b.bdg_commit_amt,0) + ifnull(b.bdg_request_amt,0) + ifnull(b.bdg_balance_amt,0) amount
bmm_trans_type = 'INCREMENT',
bmm_total_amt = ?,
bmm_year = ?,
bmm_reason = ?,
bmm_description = ?,
bmm_remark = ?,
bmm_endorse_doc = ?,
bmm_extended_field = ?,
bmm_movement_type = 'YEARLY',

title: Process Flow
name: dt_processFlow
queryMapping:
SELECT
bmd_bgt_movement_detl_id,
b.bdg_budget_id bdg_budget_id,
sb.sbg_budget_id sbg_budget_id,
UPPER(CONCAT(qb.qbu_year,' - ',qb.qbu_description)) qbu_quarter_id,
CONCAT_WS(' - ', sb.fty_fund_type, FT.fty_fund_desc) fty_fund_type,
CONCAT_WS(' - ', sb.at_activity_code, AT.at_activity_description_bm) at_activity_code,
CONCAT_WS(' - ', sb.oun_code, OUN.oun_desc) oun_code,
CONCAT_WS(' - ', sb.ccr_costcentre, CC.ccr_costcentre_desc) ccr_costcentre,
CONCAT_WS(' - ', sb.kod_so, cpa_project_desc) kod_so,
CONCAT_WS(' - ', sb.lbc_budget_code, ACM.acm_acct_desc) sbg_budget_code,
FORMAT(b.bdg_balance_amt,2) bdg_balance_amt,
FORMAT(bmd.bmd_mvt_amt,2) bmd_mvt_amt
bmm_trans_type = 'INCREMENT',
bmm_total_amt = ?,
bmm_year = ?,
bmm_reason = ?,
bmm_description = ?,
bmm_remark = ?,
bmm_endorse_doc = ?,
bmm_movement_type = ?,

title: List of Message
name: listofmessage
queryMapping: SELECT lde_value Code,lde_description Description FROM lookup_details where lma_code_name='MESSAGE_TYPE';
